ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "country_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the country (e.g., sovereign country, dependency) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag image of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., Republic, Monarchy) */,
  "independence_year" INTEGER /* Year of independence */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_boundaries" (
  "boundary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the boundary belongs to */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Spatial geometry of the boundary */,
  "boundary_type" TEXT /* Type of boundary (e.g., maritime, land) */,
  "boundary_length" REAL /* Length of the boundary in kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the boundary data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boundary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_boundaries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_details" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative detail */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the administrative detail belongs to */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative detail */,
  "admin_code" TEXT /* Code of the administrative detail */,
  "admin_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the administrative detail (e.g., sovereign country, dependency) */,
  "admin_level" TEXT /* Level of administration (e.g., state, province) */,
  "admin_area" TEXT /* Name of the administrative area */,
  "admin_population" INTEGER /* Population of the administrative area */,
  "admin_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the administrative area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the administrative data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_details_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the economic indicator belongs to */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country (e.g., high income, low income) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the economic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population_growth" REAL /* Population growth rate of the country */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  "population_distribution" TEXT /* Population distribution of the country (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution (e.g., young, middle-aged, elderly) */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy in years */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the demographic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the geographic data belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the country */,
  "geographic_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic data (e.g., capital, major city) */,
  "geographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic location */,
  "geographic_population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographic location */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Area of the geographic location in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the geographic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country name */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the name belongs to */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the name */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country in the specified language */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the country name data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_names_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country code */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the code belongs to */,
  "code_type" TEXT /* Type of code (e.g., ISO, FIPS) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "code_description" TEXT /* Description of the code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the country code data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_codes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country classification */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the classification belongs to */,
  "classification_type" TEXT /* Type of classification (e.g., sovereign country, dependency) */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the country */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the country classification data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_classifications_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the continent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the continent data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the region data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "income_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the income group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the income group data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Classification of the country (e.g., sovereign country, dependency)
